requirement_topic.en: Market Access — In-Country Importer, SIC Control and Certificate of Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——在地进口商、SIC监管与合格证明
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——在地進口商、SIC 監管與合格證明

summary.en: Colombia market access for lithium batteries and power banks is importer-led and connected to SIC market oversight. In many in-scope cases, a Certificate of Conformity chain is required for release and post-entry control, with records aligned to importer, declaration, and distributor responsibilities. Typical entry logistics include ports such as Cartagena and Buenaventura.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚对锂电池和移动电源的入市通常以进口商主导，由 SIC 监管体系衔接。在多数适用情形下，需要形成包含合格证明的完整链条以支持放行与后续监管，相关文件需与进口商、报关与销售责任人一致。主要入境口岸包括卡塔赫纳和布埃纳文图拉。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞對鋰電池與行動電源的入市通常以進口商主導，由 SIC 監管體系銜接。在大多數適用情形下，需要形成含合格證明之完整鏈條以支持放行與後續監管，且文件需與進口商、報關與銷售責任人一致。主要入境港口包括卡塔赫納和布埃納文圖拉。

standards_or_laws: SIC market supervision framework for imported electrical products
Certificate of Conformity requirements in Colombia import-facing procedures
Colombian customs and entry-document alignment for Cartagena and Buenaventura channels

summary.en: China export paperwork and customs documentation are mainly domestic trade compliance and do not replace Colombia importer-led market surveillance, Certificate of Conformity, and SIC-linked entry evidence.
summary.zh: 中国出口贸易文件和报关文件主要满足中国国内与贸易环节要求，不替代哥伦比亚以进口商为中心的市场监管、合格证明与 SIC 相关入境证据链。
summary.zht: 中國出口貿易文件和報關文件主要滿足中國國內與貿易環節要求，不替代哥倫比亞以進口商為中心的市場監管、合格證明與 SIC 相關入境證據鏈。

standards_or_laws: GB / GB T export compliance records used in Chinese commercial operations
China customs export filing and inspection records
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) where category mandates domestic conformity

gap.en: The exporter gap is organization and accountability: Chinese export packets usually optimize production and factory compliance, while Colombia requires an importer-led evidence model, SIC-facing controls, and certificate management tied to local distribution.
gap.zh: 差距在于组织责任：中国出口包常以工厂生产和国内合规为中心，而哥伦比亚要求以进口商为责任主体的证据模型、SIC 对接控制以及与本地流通责任相关的合格证明管理。
gap.zht: 差距在於組織責任：中國出口包常以工廠生產和國內合規為中心，而哥倫比亞要求以進口商為責任主體的證據模型、SIC 對接控制以及與本地流通責任相關的合格證明管理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for market placement; non-compliance can block customs clearance and post-entry enforcement where SIC and customs expectations apply.
mandatory_status.cn: China-side certificates and export declarations are mandatory for China export operations, but not sufficient in Colombia without importer-led destination compliance records.

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio (SIC), Colombia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia has no EU-style horizontal battery or environmental noise regime replacing this flow; market access is local-process driven through importer responsibility, SIC oversight, and origin-to-port documentation discipline.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚没有可替代该流程的欧盟式统一电池或户外噪声制度；市场准入由本地流程驱动，需要以进口商责任、SIC监管与口岸文件体系为核心。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞沒有可取代該流程的歐盟式統一電池或戶外噪聲制度；市場准入由本地流程驅動，需要以進口商責任、SIC 監管與口岸文件體系為核心。
